inspiration.title: Ailes de papillon
inspiration.subtitle: Inspiration
inspiration.shortDescription: À sang froid, il doit réguler sa température interne pour pouvoir prendre son envol.

innovation.title: Les panneaux solaires
innovation.subtitle: Innovation
innovation.shortDescription: Un récepteur d'énergie extérieure qui s'auto-refroidit pour rester performant.

explanation.title: Bravo vous avez trouvé le lien biomimétique
explanation.body:
Les ailes de ce papillon rejettent la chaleur sous forme d'ondes pour éviter de surchauffer. 
 En imitant cette régulation thermique, ces panneaux solaires restent frais et gardent un rendement maximal.

inspiration.title: Butterfly wings
inspiration.subtitle: Inspiration
inspiration.shortDescription: Cold-blooded, it must regulate its inner temperature before it can take flight.

innovation.title: Solar panels
innovation.subtitle: Innovation
innovation.shortDescription: An external energy receiver that self-cools to stay efficient.

explanation.title: Well done, you found the biomimetic link
explanation.body:
This butterfly's wings release heat as waves to avoid overheating. 
 By mimicking this thermal regulation, these solar panels stay cool and keep a maximum output.

inspiration.title: Kelebek kanatları
inspiration.subtitle: İlham
inspiration.shortDescription: Soğukkanlı olduğu için uçabilmek için iç sıcaklığını düzenlemesi gerekir.

innovation.title: Güneş panelleri
innovation.subtitle: İnovasyon
innovation.shortDescription: Verimli kalmak için kendi kendini soğutan bir dış enerji alıcısı.

explanation.title: Tebrikler, biyomimetik bağlantıyı buldunuz
explanation.body:
Bu kelebeğin kanatları aşırı ısınmayı önlemek için ısıyı dalgalar halinde dışarı atar. 
 Bu ısı düzenleme mekanizmasını taklit eden bu güneş panelleri serin kalır ve maksimum verimliliğini korur.

inspiration.title: Les nageoires de baleines
inspiration.subtitle: Inspiration
inspiration.shortDescription: Sa morphologie brise la résistance du courant pour glisser avec un effort minimal.

innovation.title: Les éoliennes
innovation.subtitle: Innovation
innovation.shortDescription: Ces pales géantes tournent même par vent très faible grâce à leur profil unique.

explanation.title: Bravo vous avez trouvé le lien biomimétique
explanation.body: Les bosses sur les nageoires de la baleine créent des micro-vortex qui améliorent sa portance. Sculptées de la même façon, ces pales d'éoliennes captent le vent avec beaucoup moins de frottement.

inspiration.title: Whale fins
inspiration.subtitle: Inspiration
inspiration.shortDescription: Its shape breaks the current's resistance, letting it glide with minimal effort.

innovation.title: Wind turbines
innovation.subtitle: Innovation
innovation.shortDescription: These giant blades spin even in very light wind thanks to their unique profile.

explanation.title: Well done, you found the biomimetic link
explanation.body: The bumps on the whale's fins create micro-vortices that improve its lift. Shaped the same way, these turbine blades capture wind with far less drag.

inspiration.title: Balina yüzgeçleri
inspiration.subtitle: İlham
inspiration.shortDescription: Şekli akıntının direncini kırarak minimum çabayla süzülmesini sağlar.

innovation.title: Rüzgar türbinleri
innovation.subtitle: İnovasyon
innovation.shortDescription: Bu devasa kanatlar, benzersiz profilleri sayesinde çok hafif rüzgarda bile döner.

explanation.title: Tebrikler, biyomimetik bağlantıyı buldunuz
explanation.body: Balinanın yüzgeçlerindeki tümsekler, kaldırma kuvvetini artıran mikro girdaplar oluşturur. Aynı şekilde tasarlanan bu türbin kanatları, çok daha az sürtünmeyle rüzgarı yakalar.

inspiration.title: Le martin-pêcheur
inspiration.subtitle: Inspiration
inspiration.shortDescription: Son bec effilé fend l'air et l'eau en silence pour surprendre ses proies.

innovation.title: Le TGV Japonais
innovation.subtitle: Innovation
innovation.shortDescription: Une forme aérodynamique pour réduire le bruit à haute vitesse en ville.

explanation.title: Bravo vous avez trouvé le lien biomimétique
explanation.body: Le bec du martin-pêcheur pénètre l'eau sans créer d'onde de choc. En imitant sa forme fuselée, le nez du TGV fend l'air en silence et supprime le dérangeant "bang" à la sortie des tunnels.

inspiration.title: The kingfisher
inspiration.subtitle: Inspiration
inspiration.shortDescription: Its slender beak cuts through air and water silently to surprise its prey.

innovation.title: The Japanese bullet train
innovation.subtitle: Innovation
innovation.shortDescription: An aerodynamic shape that reduces noise at high speed through cities.
innovation.alt: Streamlined nose of the Shinkansen bullet train

explanation.title: Well done, you found the biomimetic link
explanation.body: The kingfisher's beak pierces water without creating a shock wave. By copying its streamlined shape, the bullet train's nose cuts through air silently and removes the jarring "boom" when exiting tunnels.

inspiration.title: Yalıçapkını
inspiration.subtitle: İlham
inspiration.shortDescription: İnce gagası, avını şaşırtmak için havayı ve suyu sessizce yarar.

innovation.title: Japon hızlı treni
innovation.subtitle: İnovasyon
innovation.shortDescription: Şehir içinde yüksek hızda gürültüyü azaltan aerodinamik bir form.

explanation.title: Tebrikler, biyomimetik bağlantıyı buldunuz
explanation.body: Yalıçapkınının gagası suya şok dalgası oluşturmadan girer. Bu akışkan formu taklit eden hızlı trenin burnu, havayı sessizce yarar ve tünellerden çıkışta oluşan rahatsız edici "gümbürtüyü" ortadan kaldırır.

inspiration.title: Le gekko
inspiration.subtitle: Inspiration
inspiration.shortDescription: Capable de courir au plafond la tête en bas sans jamais craindre la chute.

innovation.title: La geckskin
innovation.subtitle: Innovation
innovation.shortDescription: Un simple morceau de ce tissu peut suspendre un écran plat sur un mur.

explanation.title: Bravo vous avez trouvé le lien biomimétique
explanation.body: Les pattes du gekko possèdent des millions de micro-poils qui s'aimantent à la matière à l'échelle moléculaire. Cet adhésif imite cette friction sèche pour fixer des charges lourdes sans colle.

inspiration.title: The gecko
inspiration.subtitle: Inspiration
inspiration.shortDescription: Able to run upside down across a ceiling without ever fearing a fall.

innovation.title: Geckskin adhesive
innovation.subtitle: Innovation
innovation.shortDescription: A single piece of this fabric can hold a flat-screen TV on a wall.

explanation.title: Well done, you found the biomimetic link
explanation.body: The gecko's feet are covered in millions of micro-hairs that bond to surfaces at the molecular scale. This adhesive mimics that dry friction to hold heavy loads without any glue.

inspiration.title: Gekon
inspiration.subtitle: İlham
inspiration.shortDescription: Düşme korkusu olmadan tavanda baş aşağı koşabilir.

innovation.title: Geckskin yapışkanı
innovation.subtitle: İnovasyon
innovation.shortDescription: Bu kumaşın tek bir parçası, duvara bir düz ekran televizyonu asabilir.

explanation.title: Tebrikler, biyomimetik bağlantıyı buldunuz
explanation.body: Gekonun ayaklarında, moleküler ölçekte yüzeylere tutunan milyonlarca mikro kıl bulunur. Bu yapışkan, ağır yükleri hiç tutkal kullanmadan sabitlemek için bu kuru sürtünmeyi taklit eder.

inspiration.title: Les fruits de bardane
inspiration.subtitle: Inspiration
inspiration.shortDescription: Cette plante sauvage utilise les chiens et les promeneurs pour semer ses graines.
inspiration.alt: Fruit de bardane couvert de crochets

innovation.title: Le velcro
innovation.subtitle: Innovation
innovation.shortDescription: Cette invention lie deux objets par simple pression mécanique, sans aucun adhésif.

explanation.title: Bravo vous avez trouvé le lien biomimétique
explanation.body: Les crochets souples de ce fruit s'agrippent naturellement aux boucles formées par les poils d'animaux. Le velcro reproduit ce duo mécanique pour fermer et ouvrir des tissus à l'infini.

inspiration.title: Burdock burrs
inspiration.subtitle: Inspiration
inspiration.shortDescription: This wild plant relies on dogs and walkers to scatter its seeds.

innovation.title: Velcro
innovation.subtitle: Innovation
innovation.shortDescription: This invention joins two objects with simple mechanical pressure, no adhesive at all.

explanation.title: Well done, you found the biomimetic link
explanation.body: This burr's flexible hooks naturally grip the loops formed by animal fur. Velcro reproduces this mechanical pairing to fasten and unfasten fabric endlessly.

inspiration.title: Pıtrak meyveleri
inspiration.subtitle: İlham
inspiration.shortDescription: Bu yabani bitki, tohumlarını yaymak için köpeklerden ve yürüyüşçülerden yararlanır.

innovation.title: Cırt cırt bant
innovation.subtitle: İnovasyon
innovation.shortDescription: Bu icat, hiçbir yapışkan kullanmadan iki nesneyi basit mekanik baskıyla birleştirir.

explanation.title: Tebrikler, biyomimetik bağlantıyı buldunuz
explanation.body: Bu meyvenin esnek kancaları, hayvan tüylerinin oluşturduğu ilmeklere doğal olarak tutunur. Cırt cırt bant, kumaşları sonsuz kez açıp kapatmak için bu mekanik ikiliyi yeniden üretir.

inspiration.title: Le nautile
inspiration.subtitle: Inspiration
inspiration.shortDescription: Il glisse sans effort dans l'océan grâce à une forme hydrodynamique millénaire.

innovation.title: Les turboréacteurs
innovation.subtitle: Innovation
innovation.shortDescription: Un système conçu pour fendre l'atmosphère à haute altitude et à grande vitesse.

explanation.title: Bravo vous avez trouvé le lien biomimétique
explanation.body: La coquille en spirale du nautile canalise l'eau pour le propulser par réaction. Les turboréacteurs copient cette géométrie courbe pour comprimer et guider les flux d'air avec un rendement maximal.

inspiration.title: The nautilus
inspiration.subtitle: Inspiration
inspiration.shortDescription: It glides effortlessly through the ocean thanks to a hydrodynamic shape millions of years in the making.

innovation.title: Turbojet engines
innovation.subtitle: Innovation
innovation.shortDescription: A system designed to cut through the atmosphere at high altitude and high speed.

explanation.title: Well done, you found the biomimetic link
explanation.body: The nautilus's spiral shell channels water to propel it by reaction. Turbojet engines copy this curved geometry to compress and guide airflow with maximum efficiency.

inspiration.title: Nautilus
inspiration.subtitle: İlham
inspiration.shortDescription: Milyonlarca yılda şekillenmiş hidrodinamik formu sayesinde okyanusta zahmetsizce süzülür.

innovation.title: Turbojet motorları
innovation.subtitle: İnovasyon
innovation.shortDescription: Yüksek irtifada ve yüksek hızda atmosferi yarmak için tasarlanmış bir sistem.

explanation.title: Tebrikler, biyomimetik bağlantıyı buldunuz
explanation.body: Nautilusun sarmal kabuğu, onu tepki kuvvetiyle ileri itmek için suyu yönlendirir. Turbojet motorları, hava akışını maksimum verimlilikle sıkıştırıp yönlendirmek için bu kavisli geometriyi kopyalar.

inspiration.title: La peau du requin
inspiration.subtitle: Inspiration
inspiration.shortDescription: Son corps est recouvert de millions de micro-dents alignées face au courant.
inspiration.alt: Détail de la peau d'un requin

innovation.title: Les combinaisons de natation
innovation.subtitle: Innovation
innovation.shortDescription: Une innovation textile qui a bousculé tous les records du monde de vitesse.

explanation.title: Bravo vous avez trouvé le lien biomimétique
explanation.body: La peau de ce prédateur est couverte de micro-dentelures qui canalisent l'eau et éliminent les turbulences. Cette combinaison imite ce relief rugueux pour aider le nageur à glisser bien plus vite.

inspiration.title: Shark skin
inspiration.subtitle: Inspiration
inspiration.shortDescription: Its body is covered in millions of tiny tooth-like scales aligned with the current.

innovation.title: Swimsuits
innovation.subtitle: Innovation
innovation.shortDescription: A textile innovation that shattered every speed world record.

explanation.title: Well done, you found the biomimetic link
explanation.body: This predator's skin is covered in micro-ridges that channel water and eliminate turbulence. This swimsuit mimics that rough texture to help swimmers glide much faster.

inspiration.title: Köpekbalığı derisi
inspiration.subtitle: İlham
inspiration.shortDescription: Vücudu, akıntıya hizalanmış milyonlarca mikro dişçikle kaplıdır.

innovation.title: Mayolar
innovation.subtitle: İnovasyon
innovation.shortDescription: Tüm hız dünya rekorlarını sarsan bir tekstil yeniliği.

explanation.title: Tebrikler, biyomimetik bağlantıyı buldunuz
explanation.body: Bu yırtıcının derisi, suyu yönlendiren ve türbülansı ortadan kaldıran mikro çıkıntılarla kaplıdır. Bu mayo, yüzücülerin çok daha hızlı kaymasına yardımcı olmak için bu pürüzlü dokuyu taklit eder.

inspiration.title: Le papillon Greta oto
inspiration.subtitle: Inspiration
inspiration.shortDescription: Ses membranes ne créent aucun éclat brillant qui pourrait trahir sa présence.
inspiration.alt: Papillon Greta oto aux ailes transparentes

innovation.title: Les verres anti-reflet
innovation.subtitle: Innovation
innovation.shortDescription: Permet de lire son smartphone en plein soleil sans être gêné par son propre visage.

explanation.title: Bravo vous avez trouvé le lien biomimétique
explanation.body: Les ailes de ce papillon possèdent un relief invisible qui empêche la lumière de rebondir. En copiant cette surface texturée sur les écrans et les lunettes, on élimine enfin l'effet miroir.

inspiration.title: The Greta oto butterfly
inspiration.subtitle: Inspiration
inspiration.shortDescription: Its wing membranes create no glare that could give away its presence.
inspiration.alt: Greta oto butterfly with transparent wings

innovation.title: Anti-glare glass
innovation.subtitle: Innovation
innovation.shortDescription: Lets you read your phone in bright sunlight without your own reflection getting in the way.

explanation.title: Well done, you found the biomimetic link
explanation.body: This butterfly's wings have an invisible texture that stops light from bouncing back. By copying this textured surface on screens and glasses, the mirror effect is finally eliminated.

inspiration.title: Greta oto kelebeği
inspiration.subtitle: İlham
inspiration.shortDescription: Kanat zarları, varlığını ele verebilecek hiçbir parlaklık oluşturmaz.

innovation.title: Yansıma önleyici cam
innovation.subtitle: İnovasyon
innovation.shortDescription: Parlak güneş ışığında telefonunuzu kendi yansımanız rahatsız etmeden okumanızı sağlar.

explanation.title: Tebrikler, biyomimetik bağlantıyı buldunuz
explanation.body: Bu kelebeğin kanatlarında, ışığın geri yansımasını engelleyen görünmez bir doku bulunur. Bu dokulu yüzeyi ekranlara ve gözlüklere uygulayarak, ayna etkisi nihayet ortadan kalkar.

inspiration.title: Le coléoptère de Namibie
inspiration.subtitle: Inspiration
inspiration.shortDescription: Ce scarabée du désert extrait l'eau de l'air du matin grâce à la forme de son dos.

innovation.title: Les filets capteurs de rosée
innovation.subtitle: Innovation
innovation.shortDescription: Des filets récoltent l'humidité atmosphérique dans des régions où l'eau est rare.

explanation.title: Bravo vous avez trouvé le lien biomimétique
explanation.body: Le dos du scarabée alterne des zones qui attirent l'eau et d'autres qui la repoussent. Les gouttelettes grossissent sur les premières, puis glissent vers sa bouche via les secondes. Les filets reprennent ce principe pour collecter l'eau sans consommer d'énergie.

inspiration.title: The Namib desert beetle
inspiration.subtitle: Inspiration
inspiration.shortDescription: This desert beetle extracts water from the morning air thanks to the shape of its back.

innovation.title: Dew-collecting nets
innovation.subtitle: Innovation
innovation.shortDescription: Nets that harvest atmospheric moisture in regions where water is scarce.

explanation.title: Well done, you found the biomimetic link
explanation.body: The beetle's back alternates zones that attract water with zones that repel it. Droplets grow on the first, then slide toward its mouth via the second. These nets reuse this principle to collect water without consuming any energy.

inspiration.title: Namibya çölü böceği
inspiration.subtitle: İlham
inspiration.shortDescription: Bu çöl böceği, sırtının şekli sayesinde sabah havasından su elde eder.

innovation.title: Çiy toplama ağları
innovation.subtitle: İnovasyon
innovation.shortDescription: Suyun kıt olduğu bölgelerde atmosferik nemi toplayan ağlar.

explanation.title: Tebrikler, biyomimetik bağlantıyı buldunuz
explanation.body: Böceğin sırtı, suyu çeken bölgelerle onu iten bölgeler arasında değişir. Damlacıklar önce büyür, sonra ikinci bölgeler aracılığıyla ağzına doğru kayar. Bu ağlar, enerji tüketmeden su toplamak için aynı prensibi yeniden kullanır.

inspiration.title: La cicatrice
inspiration.subtitle: Inspiration
inspiration.shortDescription: La peau referme ses plaies en mobilisant ses propres ressources internes.

innovation.title: Le béton cicatrisant
innovation.subtitle: Innovation
innovation.shortDescription: Un matériau de construction qui colmate ses fissures sans intervention humaine.

explanation.title: Bravo vous avez trouvé le lien biomimétique
explanation.body: Quand de l'eau s'infiltre dans une fissure, des bactéries encapsulées dans le béton se réactivent. Elles consomment des nutriments stockés à leur côté et produisent un minéral qui rebouche naturellement la fissure.

inspiration.title: The scar
inspiration.subtitle: Inspiration
inspiration.shortDescription: Skin heals its wounds by mobilizing its own internal resources.

innovation.title: Self-healing concrete
innovation.subtitle: Innovation
innovation.shortDescription: A building material that seals its own cracks without any human intervention.

explanation.title: Well done, you found the biomimetic link
explanation.body: When water seeps into a crack, bacteria encapsulated in the concrete reactivate. They consume nutrients stored alongside them and produce a mineral that naturally seals the crack.

inspiration.title: Yara izi
inspiration.subtitle: İlham
inspiration.shortDescription: Deri, kendi iç kaynaklarını harekete geçirerek yaralarını iyileştirir.

innovation.title: Kendi kendini onaran beton
innovation.subtitle: İnovasyon
innovation.shortDescription: İnsan müdahalesi olmadan kendi çatlaklarını kapatan bir yapı malzemesi.

explanation.title: Tebrikler, biyomimetik bağlantıyı buldunuz
explanation.body: Bir çatlağa su sızdığında, betonun içine kapsüllenmiş bakteriler yeniden aktifleşir. Yanlarında depolanan besinleri tüketir ve çatlağı doğal olarak kapatan bir mineral üretirler.

inspiration.title: La corbeille de Vénus
inspiration.subtitle: Inspiration
inspiration.shortDescription: Cette éponge des fonds marins fabrique une armature fine et pourtant indéformable.

innovation.title: Le 30 St Mary Axe
innovation.subtitle: Innovation
innovation.shortDescription: Ce gratte-ciel londonien tire sa solidité d'une géométrie en spirale venue du vivant.
innovation.alt: Gratte-ciel 30 St Mary Axe à Londres

explanation.title: Bravo vous avez trouvé le lien biomimétique
explanation.body: L'éponge Euplectella tisse des fibres de verre biologiques en treillis diagonal, ce qui lui donne une rigidité remarquable pour un poids minimal. Les architectes du Gherkin ont transposé cette logique pour concevoir une tour économe en acier et capable d'encaisser les vents urbains.

inspiration.title: Venus' flower basket
inspiration.subtitle: Inspiration
inspiration.shortDescription: This deep-sea sponge builds a frame that is fine yet remarkably rigid.

innovation.title: 30 St Mary Axe
innovation.subtitle: Innovation
innovation.shortDescription: This London skyscraper draws its strength from a spiral geometry borrowed from nature.
innovation.alt: 30 St Mary Axe skyscraper in London

explanation.title: Well done, you found the biomimetic link
explanation.body: The Euplectella sponge weaves biological glass fibers into a diagonal lattice, giving it remarkable rigidity for minimal weight. The Gherkin's architects applied this same logic to design a tower that uses less steel while withstanding urban winds.

inspiration.title: Venüs'ün çiçek sepeti
inspiration.subtitle: İlham
inspiration.shortDescription: Bu derin deniz süngeri, ince ama olağanüstü sağlam bir iskelet inşa eder.

innovation.title: 30 St Mary Axe
innovation.subtitle: İnovasyon
innovation.shortDescription: Bu Londra gökdeleni, gücünü doğadan ödünç alınan sarmal bir geometriden alır.

explanation.title: Tebrikler, biyomimetik bağlantıyı buldunuz
explanation.body: Euplectella süngeri, biyolojik cam liflerini çapraz bir kafes şeklinde örer, bu da ona minimum ağırlıkla olağanüstü bir sertlik kazandırır. Gherkin'in mimarları, kentsel rüzgarlara dayanırken daha az çelik kullanan bir kule tasarlamak için aynı mantığı uyguladı.

inspiration.title: L'effet lotus
inspiration.subtitle: Inspiration
inspiration.shortDescription: La feuille de cette plante reste impeccable par tous les temps sans aucun entretien.
inspiration.alt: Goutte d'eau sur une feuille de lotus

innovation.title: Les surfaces hydrophobes
innovation.subtitle: Innovation
innovation.shortDescription: Des revêtements architecturaux qui repoussent les salissures sans produit chimique.

explanation.title: Bravo vous avez trouvé le lien biomimétique
explanation.body: La surface de la feuille de lotus est couverte de reliefs invisibles à l'œil nu qui empêchent l'eau d'adhérer. Les gouttes roulent en emportant poussières et dépôts. En reproduisant cette texture sur des peintures ou des tuiles, on obtient des façades qui se nettoient sous la pluie.

inspiration.title: The lotus effect
inspiration.subtitle: Inspiration
inspiration.shortDescription: This plant's leaf stays spotless in any weather, with no maintenance at all.
inspiration.alt: Water droplet on a lotus leaf

innovation.title: Hydrophobic surfaces
innovation.subtitle: Innovation
innovation.shortDescription: Architectural coatings that repel dirt without any chemical products.

explanation.title: Well done, you found the biomimetic link
explanation.body: The lotus leaf's surface is covered in bumps invisible to the naked eye that prevent water from sticking. Droplets roll off, carrying away dust and grime. By reproducing this texture on paints or tiles, facades are created that clean themselves in the rain.

inspiration.title: Lotus etkisi
inspiration.subtitle: İlham
inspiration.shortDescription: Bu bitkinin yaprağı, hiçbir bakım yapılmadan her hava koşulunda kusursuz kalır.
inspiration.alt: Bir lotus yaprağı üzerindeki su damlası

innovation.title: Hidrofobik yüzeyler
innovation.subtitle: İnovasyon
innovation.shortDescription: Hiçbir kimyasal ürün kullanmadan kiri iten mimari kaplamalar.

explanation.title: Tebrikler, biyomimetik bağlantıyı buldunuz
explanation.body: Lotus yaprağının yüzeyi, suyun yapışmasını engelleyen çıplak gözle görünmeyen çıkıntılarla kaplıdır. Damlalar, tozu ve kiri de beraberinde götürerek yuvarlanır. Bu dokuyu boyalara veya kiremitlere uygulayarak, yağmurda kendini temizleyen cepheler elde edilir.

inspiration.title: Le corail
inspiration.subtitle: Inspiration
inspiration.shortDescription: Ces organismes marins bâtissent leur squelette en transformant le CO₂ dissous.

innovation.title: Le ciment neutre en carbone
innovation.subtitle: Innovation
innovation.shortDescription: Un liant minéral dont la production absorbe autant de CO₂ qu'elle n'en rejette.

explanation.title: Bravo vous avez trouvé le lien biomimétique
explanation.body: Les polypes de corail puisent le carbone présent dans l'eau pour sécréter leur structure solide. En reproduisant ce mécanisme à échelle industrielle, on dissout du CO₂ dans l'eau de mer pour fabriquer un matériau de construction qui capte plus qu'il n'en émet.

inspiration.title: Coral
inspiration.subtitle: Inspiration
inspiration.shortDescription: These marine organisms build their skeleton by transforming dissolved CO₂.

innovation.title: Carbon-neutral cement
innovation.subtitle: Innovation
innovation.shortDescription: A mineral binder whose production absorbs as much CO₂ as it releases.

explanation.title: Well done, you found the biomimetic link
explanation.body: Coral polyps draw carbon from the water to secrete their solid structure. By reproducing this mechanism at industrial scale, CO₂ is dissolved in seawater to make a building material that captures more than it emits.

inspiration.title: Mercan
inspiration.subtitle: İlham
inspiration.shortDescription: Bu deniz canlıları, çözünmüş CO₂’yi dönüştürerek iskeletlerini inşa eder.

innovation.title: Karbon nötr çimento
innovation.subtitle: İnovasyon
innovation.shortDescription: Üretimi, saldığı kadar CO₂ emen mineral bir bağlayıcı.

explanation.title: Tebrikler, biyomimetik bağlantıyı buldunuz
explanation.body: Mercan polipleri, katı yapılarını salgılamak için sudaki karbonu çeker. Bu mekanizma endüstriyel ölçekte yeniden üretilerek, CO₂ deniz suyunda çözündürülür ve salındığından fazlasını yakalayan bir yapı malzemesi elde edilir.

inspiration.title: Les lucioles
inspiration.subtitle: Inspiration
inspiration.shortDescription: Son signal d'amour doit percer la nuit noire pour attirer un partenaire lointain.

innovation.title: Les lampes LED
innovation.subtitle: Innovation
innovation.shortDescription: Une technologie idéale pour concevoir des écrans et des balises ultra-lumineux.

explanation.title: Bravo vous avez trouvé le lien biomimétique
explanation.body: Les écailles en dents de scie de la luciole empêchent sa lumière de refléter vers l'intérieur. En copiant ces micro-pentes sur les puces LED, on libère les rayons piégés pour briller 55 % plus fort.

inspiration.title: Fireflies
inspiration.subtitle: Inspiration
inspiration.shortDescription: Its love signal must pierce the pitch-black night to attract a distant mate.

innovation.title: LED lamps
innovation.subtitle: Innovation
innovation.shortDescription: A technology ideal for designing ultra-bright screens and beacons.

explanation.title: Well done, you found the biomimetic link
explanation.body: The firefly's jagged, saw-toothed scales stop its light from reflecting back inward. By copying these micro-slopes on LED chips, trapped light rays are released, shining 55% brighter.

inspiration.title: Ateş böcekleri
inspiration.subtitle: İlham
inspiration.shortDescription: Uzaktaki bir eşi çekmek için aşk sinyali zifiri karanlığı delmelidir.

innovation.title: LED lambalar
innovation.subtitle: İnovasyon
innovation.shortDescription: Ultra parlak ekranlar ve işaret fenerleri tasarlamak için ideal bir teknoloji.

explanation.title: Tebrikler, biyomimetik bağlantıyı buldunuz
explanation.body: Ateş böceğinin testere dişi şeklindeki pulları, ışığının içeri geri yansımasını engeller. Bu mikro eğimleri LED çiplerine uygulayarak, hapsolmuş ışık ışınları serbest bırakılır ve %55 daha parlak parlar.

inspiration.title: La trompe du moustique
inspiration.subtitle: Inspiration
inspiration.shortDescription: Cet insecte pénètre la barrière cutanée sans que sa cible ne s'en rende compte.

innovation.title: L'aiguille médicale indolore
innovation.subtitle: Innovation
innovation.shortDescription: Un dispositif de soin si fin que le système nerveux ne détecte pas sa présence.

explanation.title: Bravo vous avez trouvé le lien biomimétique
explanation.body: La trompe du moustique est conique et dentelée, réduisant au minimum le contact avec les nerfs. Cette aiguille médicale copie ce relief microscopique pour glisser dans la peau sans douleur.

inspiration.title: The mosquito's proboscis
inspiration.subtitle: Inspiration
inspiration.shortDescription: This insect pierces the skin barrier without its target ever noticing.

innovation.title: The painless medical needle
innovation.subtitle: Innovation
innovation.shortDescription: A medical device so fine that the nervous system doesn't detect its presence.

explanation.title: Well done, you found the biomimetic link
explanation.body: The mosquito's proboscis is conical and serrated, minimizing contact with nerve endings. This medical needle copies that microscopic texture to slide into skin painlessly.

inspiration.title: Sivrisineğin hortumu
inspiration.subtitle: İlham
inspiration.shortDescription: Bu böcek, hedefi hiç fark etmeden cilt bariyerini deler.

innovation.title: Ağrısız tıbbi iğne
innovation.subtitle: İnovasyon
innovation.shortDescription: Sinir sisteminin varlığını algılayamayacak kadar ince bir tıbbi cihaz.

explanation.title: Tebrikler, biyomimetik bağlantıyı buldunuz
explanation.body: Sivrisineğin hortumu konik ve tırtıklıdır, sinir uçlarıyla temasını en aza indirir. Bu tıbbi iğne, cilde ağrısız girmek için bu mikroskobik dokuyu kopyalar.

inspiration.title: Le manchot
inspiration.subtitle: Inspiration
inspiration.shortDescription: Face au froid polaire, ces oiseaux se serrent pour garder la chaleur collective.

innovation.title: Le District 11
innovation.subtitle: Innovation
innovation.shortDescription: Un quartier russe dont la disposition compacte réduit les pertes de chaleur.

explanation.title: Bravo vous avez trouvé le lien biomimétique
explanation.body: Les manchots empereurs se serrent en colonie dense, exposant le minimum de surface au vent. Le projet District 11 à Skolkovo reprend cette logique : des villas regroupées par blocs de dix forment un ensemble compact qui maintient des températures intérieures supérieures de 5°C.

inspiration.title: The emperor penguin
inspiration.subtitle: Inspiration
inspiration.shortDescription: Facing polar cold, these birds huddle together to preserve their collective warmth.

innovation.title: District 11
innovation.subtitle: Innovation
innovation.shortDescription: A Russian district whose compact layout reduces heat loss.

explanation.title: Well done, you found the biomimetic link
explanation.body: Emperor penguins huddle into a dense colony, exposing the least possible surface to the wind. The District 11 project in Skolkovo follows the same logic: villas grouped in blocks of ten form a compact ensemble that keeps indoor temperatures 5°C higher.

inspiration.title: İmparator penguen
inspiration.subtitle: İlham
inspiration.shortDescription: Kutup soğuğuyla karşı karşıya kalan bu kuşlar, ortak sıcaklıklarını korumak için birbirlerine sokulur.

innovation.title: District 11
innovation.subtitle: İnovasyon
innovation.shortDescription: Kompakt yerleşimi ısı kaybını azaltan bir Rus mahallesi.

explanation.title: Tebrikler, biyomimetik bağlantıyı buldunuz
explanation.body: İmparator penguenler, rüzgara mümkün olduğunca az yüzey maruz bırakarak yoğun bir koloni halinde birbirine sokulur. Skolkovo'daki District 11 projesi aynı mantığı izler: onarlı bloklar halinde gruplanan villalar, iç mekan sıcaklıklarını 5°C daha yüksek tutan kompakt bir bütün oluşturur.

inspiration.title: La termitière
inspiration.subtitle: Inspiration
inspiration.shortDescription: Ce monticule survit aux journées brûlantes et aux nuits glaciales du désert.

innovation.title: L'Eastgate Building
innovation.subtitle: Innovation
innovation.shortDescription: Une solution constructive idéale pour les pays chauds qui manquent d'électricité.

explanation.title: Bravo vous avez trouvé le lien biomimétique
explanation.body: La termitière aspire l'air frais par le bas et évacue le chaud par ses cheminées. Ce bâtiment imite ce poumon de terre pour s'auto-ventiler naturellement, réduisant sa climatisation de 90 %.

inspiration.title: The termite mound
inspiration.subtitle: Inspiration
inspiration.shortDescription: This mound survives scorching desert days and freezing desert nights.

innovation.title: The Eastgate Building
innovation.subtitle: Innovation
innovation.shortDescription: A building solution ideal for hot countries lacking reliable electricity.

explanation.title: Well done, you found the biomimetic link
explanation.body: The termite mound draws cool air in from below and vents hot air out through its chimneys. This building mimics that earthen lung to ventilate itself naturally, cutting its air conditioning needs by 90%.

inspiration.title: Termit yuvası
inspiration.subtitle: İlham
inspiration.shortDescription: Bu tümsek, çölün kavurucu günlerine ve dondurucu gecelerine dayanır.

innovation.title: Eastgate Binası
innovation.subtitle: İnovasyon
innovation.shortDescription: Güvenilir elektriği olmayan sıcak ülkeler için ideal bir yapı çözümü.

explanation.title: Tebrikler, biyomimetik bağlantıyı buldunuz
explanation.body: Termit yuvası, aşağıdan serin havayı çeker ve sıcak havayı bacalarından dışarı atar. Bu bina, kendini doğal olarak havalandırmak için bu toprak akciğeri taklit eder ve klima ihtiyacını %90 azaltır.

inspiration.title: La moule
inspiration.subtitle: Inspiration
inspiration.shortDescription: Ce mollusque s'accroche à n'importe quelle surface immergée grâce à ses filaments.

innovation.title: La colle forte
innovation.subtitle: Innovation
innovation.shortDescription: Un adhésif capable de lier des molécules actives sur du métal, même en présence d'eau.

explanation.title: Bravo vous avez trouvé le lien biomimétique
explanation.body: La moule sécrète une protéine contenant une molécule qui se fixe à presque tout, même sous l'eau. Des chercheurs ont reproduit cette chimie pour créer une colle permettant de fixer des enzymes sur des surfaces métalliques, ouvrant des applications en médecine et en capteurs biologiques.

inspiration.title: The mussel
inspiration.subtitle: Inspiration
inspiration.shortDescription: This mollusk clings to any submerged surface thanks to its byssal threads.

innovation.title: Strong adhesive
innovation.subtitle: Innovation
innovation.shortDescription: An adhesive able to bind active molecules to metal, even underwater.

explanation.title: Well done, you found the biomimetic link
explanation.body: The mussel secretes a protein containing a molecule that bonds to almost anything, even underwater. Researchers reproduced this chemistry to create an adhesive that fixes enzymes onto metal surfaces, opening applications in medicine and biological sensors.

inspiration.title: Midye
inspiration.subtitle: İlham
inspiration.shortDescription: Bu yumuşakça, byssus iplikleri sayesinde suya batmış herhangi bir yüzeye tutunur.

innovation.title: Güçlü yapışkan
innovation.subtitle: İnovasyon
innovation.shortDescription: Su altında bile aktif molekülleri metale bağlayabilen bir yapışkan.

explanation.title: Tebrikler, biyomimetik bağlantıyı buldunuz
explanation.body: Midye, su altında bile hemen hemen her şeye yapışan bir molekül içeren bir protein salgılar. Araştırmacılar, enzimleri metal yüzeylere sabitleyen bir yapışkan oluşturmak için bu kimyayı yeniden üretti, bu da tıp ve biyolojik sensörler alanında uygulamaların önünü açtı.

inspiration.title: Le zèbre
inspiration.subtitle: Inspiration
inspiration.shortDescription: Ses rayures brouillent la perception du mouvement chez celui qui l'observe.

innovation.title: Le camouflage dazzle
innovation.subtitle: Innovation
innovation.shortDescription: En 1917, des motifs géométriques sur des coques rendaient leur cap illisible.

explanation.title: Bravo vous avez trouvé le lien biomimétique
explanation.body: Le contraste fort des rayures du zèbre perturbe la lecture du déplacement par les prédateurs. Le peintre Norman Wilkinson s'en est inspiré pour couvrir les navires britanniques de formes angulaires, rendant leur cap et leur vitesse difficiles à évaluer pour les torpilleurs ennemis.

inspiration.title: The zebra
inspiration.subtitle: Inspiration
inspiration.shortDescription: Its stripes scramble a viewer's perception of its movement.

innovation.title: Dazzle camouflage
innovation.subtitle: Innovation
innovation.shortDescription: In 1917, geometric patterns painted on hulls made a ship's heading unreadable.

explanation.title: Well done, you found the biomimetic link
explanation.body: The zebra's high-contrast stripes disrupt predators' ability to read its movement. Painter Norman Wilkinson drew on this to cover British ships in angular shapes, making their heading and speed hard for enemy torpedo boats to judge.

inspiration.title: Zebra
inspiration.subtitle: İlham
inspiration.shortDescription: Çizgileri, izleyenin hareket algısını bulanıklaştırır.

innovation.title: Dazzle kamuflajı
innovation.subtitle: İnovasyon
innovation.shortDescription: 1917'de, gövdelere boyanan geometrik desenler bir geminin rotasını okunamaz hale getirdi.

explanation.title: Tebrikler, biyomimetik bağlantıyı buldunuz
explanation.body: Zebranın yüksek kontrastlı çizgileri, avcıların hareketini okuma yeteneğini bozar. Ressam Norman Wilkinson buradan ilham alarak İngiliz gemilerini köşeli şekillerle kapladı ve düşman torpido botlarının rotalarını ve hızlarını değerlendirmesini zorlaştırdı.

inspiration.title: L'orchidée
inspiration.subtitle: Inspiration
inspiration.shortDescription: Cette fleur unit une forme aérienne complexe à une gestion efficace de ses ressources.

innovation.title: Les Gardens by the Bay
innovation.subtitle: Innovation
innovation.shortDescription: Ce parc de Singapour intègre dans ses arbres géants des fonctions énergétiques.
innovation.alt: Supertrees des Gardens by the Bay à Singapour

explanation.title: Bravo vous avez trouvé le lien biomimétique
explanation.body: Les Supertrees de Gardens by the Bay s'inspirent de la forme de l'orchidée pour créer des tours végétales qui captent l'eau de pluie, accueillent des panneaux solaires et ventilent les serres environnantes. Comme la fleur, chaque structure unit esthétique et efficacité dans un seul organisme.

inspiration.title: The orchid
inspiration.subtitle: Inspiration
inspiration.shortDescription: This flower combines an intricate airborne form with the efficient management of its resources.

innovation.title: Gardens by the Bay
innovation.subtitle: Innovation
innovation.shortDescription: This Singapore park builds energy-generating functions into its giant tree-like structures.
innovation.alt: Supertrees at Gardens by the Bay in Singapore

explanation.title: Well done, you found the biomimetic link
explanation.body: The Supertrees at Gardens by the Bay draw on the orchid's form to create vertical gardens that collect rainwater, host solar panels, and ventilate the surrounding conservatories. Like the flower, each structure unites beauty and efficiency in a single organism.

inspiration.title: Orkide
inspiration.subtitle: İlham
inspiration.shortDescription: Bu çiçek, karmaşık bir havadar formu kaynaklarının verimli yönetimiyle birleştirir.

innovation.title: Gardens by the Bay
innovation.subtitle: İnovasyon
innovation.shortDescription: Bu Singapur parkı, dev ağaç benzeri yapılarına enerji üreten işlevler entegre eder.
innovation.alt: Singapur'daki Gardens by the Bay'deki Supertrees

explanation.title: Tebrikler, biyomimetik bağlantıyı buldunuz
explanation.body: Gardens by the Bay'deki Supertrees, yağmur suyunu toplayan, güneş panellerine ev sahipliği yapan ve çevredeki serleri havalandıran dikey bahçeler oluşturmak için orkidenin formundan ilham alır. Çiçek gibi, her yapı güzelliği ve verimliliği tek bir organizmada birleştirir.

inspiration.title: L'os humain
inspiration.subtitle: Inspiration
inspiration.shortDescription: Notre squelette densifie la matière là où les efforts sont forts, sans superflu.

innovation.title: La Tour Eiffel
innovation.subtitle: Innovation
innovation.shortDescription: Cette structure parisienne place son fer là où les forces l'exigent exactement.

explanation.title: Bravo vous avez trouvé le lien biomimétique
explanation.body: L'intérieur d'un os n'est pas homogène : la matière se densifie là où les contraintes mécaniques sont fortes. Eiffel a suivi cette même logique en ne plaçant le métal qu'aux endroits soumis à compression ou traction, ce qui rend sa tour plus légère que le volume d'air qu'elle occupe.

inspiration.title: Human bone
inspiration.subtitle: Inspiration
inspiration.shortDescription: Our skeleton concentrates material only where stress is greatest, with no excess.

innovation.title: The Eiffel Tower
innovation.subtitle: Innovation
innovation.shortDescription: This Parisian structure places its iron exactly where the forces demand it.

explanation.title: Well done, you found the biomimetic link
explanation.body: The inside of a bone isn't uniform: material becomes denser wherever mechanical stress is greatest. Eiffel followed this very same logic, placing metal only where it faced compression or tension — making his tower lighter than the volume of air it occupies.

inspiration.title: İnsan kemiği
inspiration.subtitle: İlham
inspiration.shortDescription: İskeletimiz, gereksiz hiçbir şey olmadan malzemeyi yalnızca gerilimin en yüksek olduğu yerde yoğunlaştırır.

innovation.title: Eyfel Kulesi
innovation.subtitle: İnovasyon
innovation.shortDescription: Bu Parisli yapı, demirini tam olarak kuvvetlerin gerektirdiği yerlere yerleştirir.

explanation.title: Tebrikler, biyomimetik bağlantıyı buldunuz
explanation.body: Bir kemiğin içi homojen değildir: malzeme, mekanik gerilimin en yüksek olduğu yerlerde yoğunlaşır. Eiffel de aynı mantığı izleyerek metali yalnızca basınç veya gerilime maruz kalan yerlere yerleştirdi, bu da kulesini kapladığı hava hacminden daha hafif hale getirdi.
